---
title: "Limitations"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
**Where this work falls short and what you should NOT trust it for.** Being
candid here is what earns the rest of the document its credibility — a reader
who sees this section take its own work seriously is more likely to trust
everything else.
:::

<!--
prompt:
  - What did you NOT test, evaluate, or include? Where are the gaps?
  - In what conditions would this approach fail, mislead, or degrade?
  - What would you check, measure, or rule out before trusting this in
    production / a decision / a downstream system?
  - Are there known biases, assumptions, or shortcuts in the data, design,
    or evaluation that a reader should keep in mind when interpreting the
    results?
-->
